---
title: "nitrix.stats.inference.cluster"
generated: true
signature-hash: 11c00af41870b927
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.inference.cluster` (signatures only). Replace the
skeletons with authored prose; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5).
`check_reference_staleness.py` flags this page if the underlying
signatures drift from this stub.
:::

## `cluster_size_map` {#cluster_size_map}

```python
cluster_size_map(labels: Int[Array, '*spatial']) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```

Per-voxel size (voxel count) of the connected component it belongs to.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `cluster_mass_map` {#cluster_mass_map}

```python
cluster_mass_map(labels: Int[Array, '*spatial'], stat: Float[Array, '*spatial'], threshold: float) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```

Per-voxel cluster *mass*: the component's summed ``stat - threshold``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*
